channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: 2nd man detained, released, sources say
item.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

item.title: Obama on ICE shootings in Minnesota: "This is not the America we believe in"
item.description: President Obama spoke about the "unprecedented nature" of what he said Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents did in Minnesota.

item.title: This week on "Sunday Morning" (Feb. 15)
item.description: A look at the features for this week's broadcast of the Emmy-winning program, hosted by Jane Pauley.

item.title: Law enforcement block road near Nancy Guthrie’s home during investigation into her disappearance
item.description: Law enforcement investigating the disappearance of “Today” show host Savannah Guthrie’s mother have blocked off a road near Nancy Guthrie’s home in Ar...

item.title: US ocean regulator faces criticism over changes to right whale protection rule
TSA agents are working without pay at US airports due to another shutdown
Why Gen Z might start turning to matchmakers over dating apps
item.description: Why are more young people choosing to work with matchmakers over dating apps? CBS News associate producer Lauren Fichten speaks to Gen Z New Yorkers a...

item.title: WATCH: Romantic Valentine’s Day lights in Michigan
item.description: Dearborn Peace Park West is decorated with Valentine’s Day-themed lights and displays.

item.title: WATCH: Advice from seniors for Valentine's Day
item.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to four couples who've been together for a combined 200 years about the secrets to a lasting and loving relationship.

item.title: Gen Z is logging off and looking for love this Valentine's Day with matchmakers
item.description: Interest in matchmakers is rising as Gen Z disenchantment with dating apps grows, experts say.

item.title: Olympic organizers promise Valentine's weekend restock after condoms run out
item.description: Olympic organizers promise that the villages where athletes live won't run out of free condoms again during the Milan Cortina Winter Games.

item.title: WATCH: Exploring the delights at San Diego Zoo
item.description: Marco Wendt is wildlife ambassador with the San Diego Zoo Wildlife Alliance.

item.title: Partial shutdown hits DHS: What to know about negotiations, potential impacts
item.description: Lawmakers remain at an impasse over immigration enforcement, with Department of Homeland Security funding set to run out at the end of the day Friday.
